testcase.name: Connection Status Fix - End-to-End Validation › 1. Load application in browser
testcase.system-out: === TEST 1: Loading Application === [BROWSER DEBUG]: [vite] connecting... [BROWSER ERROR]: WebSocket connection to 'ws://localhost:443/?token=LNMwf-rtRVDK' failed: Error in connection establishment: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER LOG]: [vite] server connection lost. Polling for restart... [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER INFO]: %cDownload the React DevTools for a better development experience: https://reactjs.org/link/react-devtools font-weight:bold [BROWSER LOG]: 🔗 API Service initialized with base URL: /api [BROWSER LOG]: 🔌 Attempting WebSocket connection to: ws://localhost:5173/ws [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 Creating new MentionService instance [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 MentionServiceImpl constructor called [BROWSER LOG]: 🔍 Constructor: agents array initialized: {hasAgents: true, isArray: true, length: 13, firstAgent: Chief of Staff} [BROWSER LOG]: ✅ MentionService instance created, agents length: 13 [BROWSER LOG]: 🔍 MonitoringApiService initialized with base URL: /api/monitoring [BROWSER LOG]: DEBUG: App.tsx loading... [BROWSER LOG]: DEBUG: Loading SocialMediaFeed... [BROWSER LOG]: main.tsx: File loading... [BROWSER LOG]: main.tsx: Imports complete, starting application... [BROWSER LOG]: AgentLink: Creating React root... [BROWSER LOG]: AgentLink: Rendering application with error boundaries... [BROWSER LOG]: AgentLink: ✅ Application started successfully [BROWSER LOG]: DEBUG: App component rendering... [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 RealSocialMediaFeed RENDER: {loading: true, error: null, postsLength: 0, postsType: object, postsIsArray: true} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering loading state [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: Initial useEffect triggered [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: loadPosts called {pageNum: 0, append: false, filterType: all} [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 Calling apiService.getAgentPosts... [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: Filter changed, reloading posts {type: all} [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: loadPosts called {pageNum: 0, append: false, filterType: all} [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 Calling apiService.getAgentPosts... [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RouteWrapper: feed mounted [BROWSER WARNING]: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. [BROWSER WARNING]: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: Relative route resolution within Splat routes is changing in v7. You can use the `v7_relativeSplatPath` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_relativesplatpath. [BROWSER LOG]: DEBUG: App component mounted! ✓ Application loaded successfully ✓ Screenshot saved: 01-app-loaded.png
testcase.system-err: [REQUEST FAILED]: http://localhost:443/ - net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [REQUEST FAILED]: http://localhost:443/ - net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED

testcase.name: Connection Status Fix - End-to-End Validation › 2. Check connection status indicator
testcase.system-out: === TEST 2: Connection Status Indicator === [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: loadPosts called {pageNum: 0, append: false, filterType: all} [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 Calling apiService.getAgentPosts... [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 RealSocialMediaFeed RENDER: {loading: true, error: null, postsLength: 0, postsType: object, postsIsArray: true} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering loading state [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: WebSocket connection to 'ws://localhost:5173/ws' failed: Error during WebSocket handshake: Unexpected response code: 404 [BROWSER ERROR]: ❌ WebSocket error: Event [BROWSER LOG]: 🔌 WebSocket connection closed [BROWSER WARNING]: API request failed (attempt 1/4): /filter-data. Retrying in 1000ms... Request timeout after 5000ms for /filter-data [BROWSER LOG]: ✅ HTTP API connection established [BROWSER LOG]: 📦 Raw API response: {success: true, data: Array(5), total: 5, posts: Array(5)} [BROWSER LOG]: 📊 Processed data: {postsDataType: object, postsDataIsArray: true, postsDataLength: 5, totalCount: 5} [BROWSER LOG]: ✅ Valid posts array: {validPostsLength: 5, firstPostId: test-post-1, firstPostTitle: Production Validation Test - High Activity} [BROWSER LOG]: 📝 Setting posts array with 5 posts [BROWSER LOG]: 🏁 loadPosts finished - loading set to false [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 RealSocialMediaFeed RENDER: {loading: false, error: null, postsLength: 5, postsType: object, postsIsArray: true} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 About to render posts: {postsExists: true, postsLength: 5, postsType: object, isArray: true} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 0 : {id: test-post-1, title: Production Validation Test - High Activity, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":42,"likes":15,"shares":3,"views":127}} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 1 : {id: test-post-2, title: Comment Counter Test - Medium Activity, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":8,"likes":5,"shares":1,"views":45}} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 2 : {id: test-post-3, title: Zero Comments Test, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":0,"likes":2,"shares":0,"views":10}} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 3 : {id: test-post-4, title: Single Comment Test, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":1,"likes":3,"shares":0,"views":22}} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 4 : {id: test-post-5, title: Large Number Test, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":999,"likes":50,"shares":12,"views":543}} [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 DEBUG: Fetching suggestions {mentionQuery: null, debouncedQuery: , isDropdownOpen: false} [BROWSER LOG]: ⏹️ DEBUG: Skipping fetch - dropdown closed [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 Attempting WebSocket reconnection... [BROWSER LOG]: 🔌 Attempting WebSocket connection to: ws://localhost:5173/ws [BROWSER WARNING]: API request failed (attempt 1/4): /v1/agent-posts?limit=20&offset=0&filter=all&search=&sortBy=published_at&sortOrder=DESC. Retrying in 1000ms... Request timeout after 10000ms for /v1/agent-posts?limit=20&offset=0&filter=all&search=&sortBy=published_at&sortOrder=DESC [BROWSER WARNING]: API request failed (attempt 1/4): /v1/agent-posts?limit=20&offset=0&filter=all&search=&sortBy=published_at&sortOrder=DESC. Retrying in 1000ms... Request timeout after 10000ms for /v1/agent-posts?limit=20&offset=0&filter=all&search=&sortBy=published_at&sortOrder=DESC [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER WARNING]: API request failed (attempt 2/4): /filter-data. Retrying in 2000ms... Request timeout after 5000ms for /filter-data [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED ✓ Found connection status with selector: text=/connected/i Connection status - Has "Connected": true Connection status - Has "Disconnected": false ✓ Connection status indicator verified ✓ Screenshot saved: 02-connected-status.png

testcase.name: Connection Status Fix - End-to-End Validation › 4. Verify posts are loading in UI
testcase.system-out: === TEST 4: Posts Loading Validation === [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED ✓ Found 5 posts using selector: article Page has error messages: false Page has failed messages: false Page has SqliteError: false [BROWSER ERROR]: API request failed after 4 attempts: /filter-data Error: Request timeout after 5000ms for /filter-data at ApiService.request (http://localhost:5173/src/services/api.ts:94:25) at async ApiService.getFilterData (http://localhost:5173/src/services/api.ts:825:24) at async Promise.all (index 0) at async http://localhost:5173/src/components/RealSocialMediaFeed.tsx:214:29 [BROWSER ERROR]: API Error in getFilterData: Error: Request timeout after 5000ms for /filter-data at ApiService.request (http://localhost:5173/src/services/api.ts:94:25) at async ApiService.getFilterData (http://localhost:5173/src/services/api.ts:825:24) at async Promise.all (index 0) at async http://localhost:5173/src/components/RealSocialMediaFeed.tsx:214:29 [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 RealSocialMediaFeed RENDER: {loading: false, error: null, postsLength: 5, postsType: object, postsIsArray: true} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 About to render posts: {postsExists: true, postsLength: 5, postsType: object, isArray: true} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 0 : {id: test-post-1, title: Production Validation Test - High Activity, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":42,"likes":15,"shares":3,"views":127}} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 1 : {id: test-post-2, title: Comment Counter Test - Medium Activity, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":8,"likes":5,"shares":1,"views":45}} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 2 : {id: test-post-3, title: Zero Comments Test, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":0,"likes":2,"shares":0,"views":10}} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 3 : {id: test-post-4, title: Single Comment Test, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":1,"likes":3,"shares":0,"views":22}} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering post 4 : {id: test-post-5, title: Large Number Test, comments: undefined, hasCommentsField: false, engagement: {"comments":999,"likes":50,"shares":12,"views":543}} ✓ Posts section verified ✓ Screenshot saved: 04-posts-loaded.png
testcase.system-err: [REQUEST FAILED]: http://localhost:443/ - net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [REQUEST FAILED]: http://localhost:443/ - net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [REQUEST FAILED]: http://localhost:5173/api/filter-data - net::ERR_ABORTED

testcase.name: Connection Status Fix - End-to-End Validation › 5. Check console for errors
testcase.system-out:
=== TEST 5: Console Error Validation === [BROWSER DEBUG]: [vite] connecting... [BROWSER ERROR]: WebSocket connection to 'ws://localhost:443/?token=LNMwf-rtRVDK' failed: Error in connection establishment: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER LOG]: [vite] server connection lost. Polling for restart... [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER INFO]: %cDownload the React DevTools for a better development experience: https://reactjs.org/link/react-devtools font-weight:bold [BROWSER LOG]: 🔗 API Service initialized with base URL: /api [BROWSER LOG]: 🔌 Attempting WebSocket connection to: ws://localhost:5173/ws [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 Creating new MentionService instance [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 MentionServiceImpl constructor called [BROWSER LOG]: 🔍 Constructor: agents array initialized: {hasAgents: true, isArray: true, length: 13, firstAgent: Chief of Staff} [BROWSER LOG]: ✅ MentionService instance created, agents length: 13 [BROWSER LOG]: 🔍 MonitoringApiService initialized with base URL: /api/monitoring [BROWSER LOG]: DEBUG: App.tsx loading... [BROWSER LOG]: DEBUG: Loading SocialMediaFeed... [BROWSER LOG]: main.tsx: File loading... [BROWSER LOG]: main.tsx: Imports complete, starting application... [BROWSER LOG]: AgentLink: Creating React root... [BROWSER LOG]: AgentLink: Rendering application with error boundaries... [BROWSER LOG]: AgentLink: ✅ Application started successfully [BROWSER LOG]: DEBUG: App component rendering... [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 RealSocialMediaFeed RENDER: {loading: true, error: null, postsLength: 0, postsType: object, postsIsArray: true} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering loading state [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: Initial useEffect triggered [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: loadPosts called {pageNum: 0, append: false, filterType: all} [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 Calling apiService.getAgentPosts... [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: Filter changed, reloading posts {type: all} [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: loadPosts called {pageNum: 0, append: false, filterType: all} [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 Calling apiService.getAgentPosts... [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RouteWrapper: feed mounted [BROWSER WARNING]: ⚠️ React Router Future Flag Warning: React Router will begin wrapping state updates in `React.startTransition` in v7. You can use the `v7_startTransition` future flag to opt-in early. For more information, see https://reactrouter.com/v6/upgrading/future#v7_starttransition. [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 RealSocialMediaFeed: loadPosts called {pageNum: 0, append: false, filterType: all} [BROWSER LOG]: 🔄 Calling apiService.getAgentPosts... [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 RealSocialMediaFeed RENDER: {loading: true, error: null, postsLength: 0, postsType: object, postsIsArray: true} [BROWSER LOG]: 🎨 Rendering loading state [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED [BROWSER ERROR]: WebSocket connection to 'ws://localhost:5173/ws' failed: Error during WebSocket handshake: Unexpected response code: 404 [BROWSER ERROR]: ❌ WebSocket error: Event [BROWSER LOG]: 🔌 WebSocket connection closed [BROWSER WARNING]: API request failed (attempt 1/4): /filter-data. Retrying in 1000ms...
